creator: ae@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to igor.polovykh from comment #0)

> 1.2.0.255:0.0.255.0

mask 0.0.255.0 means that all octets with zero will match any number. And where is 255 will match the number what specified in the IP address exactly. I.e. *.*.0.*, so it works as expected and designed.
